caption: The video begins with a static image featuring the logo and name of Aarhus Universitet, accompanied by the text "Tak fordi du så med," which translates to "Thank you for watching" in English. The background is a deep blue, creating a professional and formal appearance. This frame remains constant throughout the sequence, suggesting that it serves as an end screen or closing message for a presentation or video produced by Aarhus University. The simplicity and consistency of the design emphasize gratitude towards the viewers, likely concluding an educational or informational content piece.
